chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْأَوْقَاتِ وَ الْحَالَاتِ الَّتِي تُرْجَى فِيهَا الْإِجَابَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The timings and the situation in which the Answer is hoped for

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/33)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/33)

parts.text: يَحْيَى بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ أَبِي الْبِلَادِ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) اطْلُبُوا الدُّعَاءَ فِي أَرْبَعِ سَاعَاتٍ عِنْدَ هُبُوبِ الرِّيَاحِ وَ زَوَالِ الْأَفْيَاءِ وَ نُزُولِ الْقَطْرِ وَ أَوَّلِ قَطْرَةٍ مِنْ دَمِ الْقَتِيلِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَإِنَّ أَبْوَابَ السَّمَاءِ تُفَتَّحُ عِنْدَ هَذِهِ الْأَشْيَاءِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Yahya Bin Ibrahim Bin Abu Al Balaad, from his father, from Zayd Al Shahaam who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘Seek the supplication during four timings – during the gusts of the winds, and the decline of the shadows, and the descent of the (rain) drops, and the first drop of blood of the murdered Momin, for the doors of the sky are Opened during these things’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Yahya ibn Ibrahim ibn abu al-Belad from his father from Ziyad al- Shahham who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Seek prayer in four hours: at the time of the blowing of winds, at the time of vanishing of shadows, at the time of the coming of raindrops and at the time the first drop of the blood of a believing person murdered spills. At such times the doors of the heavens open up.’”
